lyric: And I, I'm desperate for you. And I, I'm lost without you.
I want to stand with you on a mountain, I want to bathe with you in the sea. I want to lay like this forever...
I want to sit at your feet, drink from the cup in your hand. Lay back against you and breathe, feel your heartbeat.
You're the closest to heaven that I'll ever be, and I don't want to go home right now.
You're all I want, you're all I've ever needed. You're all I want, Help me know you are near.
If I lay here, if I just lay here, would you lie with me and just forget the world?
You are the strength that keeps me walking. You are the hope that keeps me trusting. You are the life to my soul...
When you're lost and you're alone and you can't get back again, I will find you, darling, and I will bring you home.
Hungry, I come to you, for I know you satisfy. I am empty, but I know your love does not run dry.
I knew I loved you before I met you, I think I dreamed you into life.
He is jealous for me, loves like a hurricane, I am a tree bending beneath the weight of His wind and mercy.
I could stay awake just to hear you breathing, watch you smile while you are sleeping.
song: I Don't Want to Miss a Thing

lyric: Your love is king, crown you in my heart.
Altogether lovely, altogether worthy, altogether wonderful to me.
